title: HTTP Sig: require Date and Digest headers
description: HTTP Signature verification must require both Date and Digest headers per the Mastodon HTTP Signature profile. Using if let Some(...) silently passes when either is missing. Check Broadside's signature verification.
close_reason: Not vulnerable: server.rs:699-798 enforces both Date and Digest as mandatory with hard 400 rejections. Uses match/None pattern, not if-let-Some.
